# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
  "name": "acme/app",
  "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation via Composer scripts",
  "type": "project",
  "license": "proprietary",
  "require": {
    "php": "^8.1"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "post-install-cmd": [
      "@setup:dirs",
      "@setup:download-assets",
      "@setup:php",
      "@setup:shell"
    ],
    "post-update-cmd": [
      "@setup:dirs",
      "@setup:download-assets",
      "@setup:php",
      "@setup:shell"
    ],
    "setup:dirs": [
      "php -r \"@mkdir('var', 0775, true); @mkdir('var/cache', 0775, true); @mkdir('var/log', 0775, true); @mkdir('public/assets', 0775, true);\""
    ],
    "setup:download-assets": [
      "php -r \"@mkdir('public/assets/vendor', 0775, true);\"",
      "php -r \"copy('https://example.com/assets/app.css','public/assets/vendor/app.css') || exit(1);\"",
      "php -r \"copy('https://example.com/assets/app.js','public/assets/vendor/app.js') || exit(1);\"",
      "php -r \"copy('https://example.com/assets/logo.svg','public/assets/vendor/logo.svg') || exit(1);\""
    ],
    "setup:php": [
      "php scripts/post_install.php",
      "php scripts/compile_assets.php"
    ],
    "setup:shell": [
      "sh -lc \"[ -f .env ] || ( [ -f .env.example ] && cp .env.example .env || true )\"",
      "sh -lc \"command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npm ci && npm run build || true\"",
      "sh -lc \"command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1 && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build || true\""
    ]
  },
  "config": {
    "sort-packages": true,
    "preferred-install": "dist",
    "optimize-autoloader": true,
    "allow-plugins": {
      "composer/package-versions-deprecated": true
    }
  },
  "minimum-stability": "stable",
  "prefer-stable": true
}
